Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.diff

Class ContextGenerator

java.lang.Object
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.diff.ContextGenerator
public final class ContextGenerator extends Object
Returns the difference between two values as an exception context.

    Method
    Description
    List<ContextLine>
    getContext(String actualName, Object actualValue, String expectedName, Object expectedValue, boolean expectedInMessage)
    Equivalent to getContext(actualName, actualValue, expectedName, expectedValue, epectedInMessage, true).
    <T> List<ContextLine>
    getContext(String actualName, List<?> actualValue, String expectedName, List<?> expectedValue, boolean expectedInMessage)
    Generates a List-specific exception context from the actual and expected values.

  • Constructor Details

    • ContextGenerator

      public ContextGenerator(Configuration configuration, ApplicationScope scope)
      Parameters:
      configuration - the instance configuration
      scope - the application configuration
      Throws:
      AssertionError - if configuration or scope are null

  • Method Details

    • getContext

      public <T> List<ContextLine> getContext(String actualName, List<?> actualValue, String expectedName, List<?> expectedValue, boolean expectedInMessage)
      Generates a List-specific exception context from the actual and expected values.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the type of elements in the list
      Parameters:
      actualName - the name of the actual value
      actualValue - the actual value
      expectedName - the name of the expected value
      expectedValue - the expected value
      expectedInMessage - true if the expected value is already mentioned in the failure message
      Returns:
      the list of name-value pairs to append to the exception message
      Throws:
      AssertionError - if actualName or expectedName are null

    • getContext

      public List<ContextLine> getContext(String actualName, Object actualValue, String expectedName, Object expectedValue, boolean expectedInMessage)
      Equivalent to getContext(actualName, actualValue, expectedName, expectedValue, epectedInMessage, true).
      Parameters:
      actualName - the name of the actual value
      actualValue - the actual value
      expectedName - the name of the expected value
      expectedValue - the expected value
      expectedInMessage - true if the expected value is already mentioned in the failure message
      Returns:
      the list of name-value pairs to append to the exception message
      Throws:
      AssertionError - if actualName or expectedName are null
